name: com.parking.billing.IInvoiceRepository
comment: Exported interface — allows other modules (e.g. Notification) to query invoices without depending on internal billing classes. Writes go through BillingService only.

name: com.parking.charging.IChargingSessionRepo
comment: Exported interface — allows other modules (e.g. Notification) to query charging sessions without depending on internal charging classes.

methods.name: liveEnergyKwh
methods.comment: Returns live kWh for ACTIVE sessions (7.4 kW rate), or the stored value otherwise.

methods.name: extractLicensePlate
methods.comment: Sends a base64-encoded image to a vision model and asks it to extract the license plate. Returns the raw text response from the model (the plate number, or empty if not found).

name: com.parking.notification.INotificationRepo
comment: Exported interface — allows other modules to query notification history without depending on internal notification classes.

name: com.parking.notification.internal.NotificationTemplates
comment: Value objects — one template per event type. Each carries the subject/body rendering logic for that event.

name: com.parking.pricing.IPricingPolicy
comment: Exported interface — allows the Reservation and Billing modules to price a parking session without depending on internal pricing classes.

name: com.parking.pricing.PricingEstimateDTO
comment: Read model returned to callers requesting a price estimate.

name: com.parking.pricing.PricingRuleChangedEvent
comment: Published when a pricing rule is created, updated, or deleted.

name: com.parking.reservation.IReservationRepo
comment: Exported interface — allows other modules (e.g. Notification) to query reservations without depending on internal reservation classes. Writes go through ReservationService only.

name: com.parking.reservation.ReservationCancelledEvent
comment: Published when a reservation is cancelled. Placeholder — full implementation in Phase 5.

name: com.parking.reservation.ReservationCreatedEvent
comment: Published when a reservation is confirmed. Placeholder — full implementation in Phase 5.

methods.name: getSchedule
methods.comment: Returns all non-cancelled reservations for a space (for schedule display).

methods.name: searchAvailable
methods.comment: Returns space IDs in the zone that have no overlapping reservations in [startTime, endTime].

name: com.parking.usermgmt.IUserRepository
comment: Public repository contract for the User aggregate. Exposes only the custom query method; standard CRUD is on the JPA implementation. Other modules must not import the internal {@code UserRepository} directly.

name: com.parking.usermgmt.UserDTO
comment: Read model returned to callers outside this module.

name: com.parking.usermgmt.UserRegisteredEvent
comment: Published when a new user completes registration. The Notification module listens to this event to send a welcome e-mail.

name: com.parking.usermgmt.internal.JwtAuthFilter
comment:
Reads the {@code Authorization: Bearer } header, validates the JWT, and populates the {@link SecurityContextHolder} with the authenticated principal.

The principal stored in the {@code Authentication} is the user's {@link UUID}. Requests without a valid token proceed unauthenticated (the security filter chain will reject them for protected endpoints).

name: com.parking.usermgmt.internal.SecurityConfig
comment: Security configuration owned by the User Management module. Replaces the skeleton-phase permit-all config.

name: com.parking.usermgmt.internal.UserRepository
comment: Spring Data JPA implementation of the module's repository contract. Package-private — callers outside this module use {@link IUserRepository}.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.IReservationAvailability
comment: Exported interface — owned by the ZoneMgmt module. Implemented by the Reservation module to allow the ZoneMgmt module to check whether a space has any conflicting reservations in a given time window, without creating a reverse dependency.

methods.name: hasOverlap
methods.comment: Returns true if there is at least one non-cancelled reservation for the given space that overlaps [startTime, endTime).

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.ISpaceQuery
comment: Exported interface — allows other modules (e.g. Pricing) to look up space details without depending on internal zone management classes.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.ISpaceStateManager
comment: Exported interface — allows the Reservation module to update space states without depending on internal zone management classes.

methods.name: lockSpace
methods.comment: Acquires a pessimistic write lock on the space row for the duration of the current transaction. Used to serialise concurrent reservation creation for the same space without changing the space's displayed state.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.IZoneAvailability
comment: Exported interface — allows the Reservation module to check space availability without depending on internal zone management classes.

methods.name: findAllSpaceIds
methods.comment: Returns IDs of ALL spaces in the zone regardless of current state.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.IZoneQuery
comment: Exported interface — allows other modules (e.g. Pricing) to list zones without depending on internal zone management classes.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.ParkingZoneDTO
comment: Read model for a parking zone, including live availability count and map data.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.SpaceStateChangedEvent
comment: Published when a parking space transitions to a new state. The Notification module listens for OCCUPIED transitions to log anomalies.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.internal.IParkingZoneRepo
comment: Internal repository contract for ParkingZone and ParkingSpace aggregates. Only used within the Zone Management module — other modules depend on IZoneAvailability.

name: com.parking.zonemgmt.internal.ParkingZoneRepo
comment: JPA-backed implementation of {@link IParkingZoneRepo}. Package-private — callers outside this module use the interface.
